query:
SELECT 
  sa.role,
  sa.userId,
  tm.name as teamMemberName,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sa.surveyId) as totalAssigned,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.status IN ('surveyed','follow_up','quoted','negotiating','won') THEN sa.surveyId END) as surveyedCount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.installationStatus IN ('completed','delivered') THEN sa.surveyId END) as wonCount
FROM survey_assignments sa
LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON sa.userId = tm.id
LEFT JOIN surveys s ON sa.surveyId = s.id
GROUP BY sa.role, sa.userId, tm.name
ORDER BY sa.role, totalAssigned DESC
LIMIT 30;

SELECT 
  sa.role,
  sa.userId,
  tm.name as teamMemberName,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sa.surveyId) as totalAssigned,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.status IN ('surveyed','follow_up','quoted','negotiating','won') THEN sa.surveyId END) as surveyedCount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.installationStatus IN ('completed','delivered') THEN sa.surveyId END) as wonCount
FROM survey_assignments sa
LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON sa.userId = tm.id
LEFT JOIN surveys s ON sa.surveyId = s.id
GROUP BY sa.role, sa.userId, tm.name
ORDER BY sa.role, totalAssigned DESC
LIMIT 30;
